text.title: AI Orphan-Link Detection Worked Example
text.summary: One worked example end-to-end for ai-orphan-link-detection — narrative trace plus the final artefact.

section.title: Narrative trace
section.p: doc.md links `[[non-existent-slug]]` → not in slug index → orphan category=methodology-slug-unknown → verdict=fail.

section.title: Final artefact
